checks.name: helm-render
checks.stdout_tail:
: pilot-cutctx
    namespace: default
roleRef:
  kind: Role
  name: pilot-cutctx
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io

---
# Source: cutctx/templates/service.yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: pilot-cutctx
  labels:
    helm.sh/chart: cutctx-0.31.0
    app.kubernetes.io/name: cutctx
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: pilot
    app.kubernetes.io/version: "0.31.0"
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: Helm
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: 80
      targetPort: http
      protocol: TCP
      name: http
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: cutctx
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: pilot

---
# Source: cutctx/templates/deployment.yaml
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: pilot-cutctx
  labels:
    helm.sh/chart: cutctx-0.31.0
    app.kubernetes.io/name: cutctx
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: pilot
    app.kubernetes.io/version: "0.31.0"
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: Helm
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: cutctx
      app.kubernetes.io/instance: pilot
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: cutctx
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: pilot
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: pilot-cutctx
      securityContext:
        fsGroup: 1000
        runAsGroup: 1000
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
      containers:
        - name: cutctx
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            capabilities:
              drop:
              - ALL
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
          image: "ghcr.io/cutctx/cutctx:0.31.0"
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 8787
              protocol: TCP
          env:
            - name: CUTCTX_HOST
              value: "0.0.0.0"
            - name: CUTCTX_PORT
              value: "8787"
            - name: CUTCTX_PROXY_COMPRESSION
              value: "true"
            - name: CUTCTX_PROXY_COMPRESSION_MODE
              value: "live_zone"
            - name: CUTCTX_BACKEND
              value: "anthropic"
            - name: CUTCTX_MODE
              value: "token"
            - name: CUTCTX_MAX_BODY_MB
              value: "50"
            - name: CUTCTX_AUDIT_DISABLED
              value: "0"
            - name: CUTCTX_ADMIN_API_KEY
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: pilot-cutctx-secrets
                  key: admin-api-key
            - name: CUTCTX_PROXY_API_KEY
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: pilot-cutctx-secrets
                  key: proxy-api-key
            - name: CUTCTX_CLIENT_API_KEY
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: pilot-cutctx-secrets
                  key: client-api-key
          livenessProbe:
            failureThreshold: 3
            httpGet:
              path: /livez
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 15
            timeoutSeconds: 5
          readinessProbe:
            failureThreshold: 3
            httpGet:
              path: /readyz
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 5
          startupProbe:
            failureThreshold: 30
            httpGet:
              path: /livez
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 5
          resources:
            null
          volumeMounts:
            - name: data
              mountPath: /home/nonroot/.cutctx
            - name: tmp
              mountPath: /tmp
      volumes:
        - name: data
          persistentVolumeClaim:
            claimName: pilot-cutctx-pvc
        # The image runs with a read-only root filesystem. Python, TLS, and
        # optional provider SDKs need a writable temporary directory.
        - name: tmp
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 64Mi

checks.name: docker-compose-config
checks.stdout_tail:
name: headroom
services:
  cutctx-proxy:
    build:
      context: /Users/aryansingh/Documents/Claude/Projects/headroom
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    command:
      - --host
      - 0.0.0.0
    depends_on:
      neo4j:
        condition: service_started
        required: true
      qdrant:
        condition: service_started
        required: true
    environment:
      CUTCTX_ADMIN_API_KEY: pilot-admin-secret
      CUTCTX_CLIENT_API_KEY: pilot-client-secret
      CUTCTX_HOST: 0.0.0.0
      CUTCTX_PROXY_API_KEY: pilot-proxy-secret
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - curl
        - --fail
        - --silent
        - http://127.0.0.1:8787/readyz
      timeout: 5s
      interval: 30s
      retries: 3
      start_period: 20s
    networks:
      default: null
    ports:
      - mode: ingress
        target: 8787
        published: "8787"
        protocol: tcp
    volumes:
      - type: volume
        source: cutctx_data
        target: /home/nonroot/.cutctx
        volume: {}
  neo4j:
    environment:
      NEO4J_AUTH: neo4j/pilot-graph-secret
      NEO4J_PLUGINS: '["apoc"]'
      NEO4J_apoc_export_file_enabled: "true"
      NEO4J_apoc_import_file_enabled: "true"
      NEO4J_apoc_import_file_use__neo4j__config: "true"
    image: neo4j:5.26
    networks:
      default: null
    volumes:
      - type: volume
        source: neo4j_data
        target: /data
        volume: {}
  qdrant:
    environment:
      QDRANT__SERVICE__GRPC_PORT: "6334"
    image: qdrant/qdrant:v1.17.1
    networks:
      default: null
    volumes:
      - type: volume
        source: qdrant_data
        target: /qdrant/storage
        volume: {}
networks:
  default:
    name: headroom_default
volumes:
  cutctx_data:
    name: headroom_cutctx_data
  neo4j_data:
    name: headroom_neo4j_data
  qdrant_data:
    name: headroom_qdrant_data

external_signoffs.name: Contracting entity and approved pilot agreement
Legal review of terms, privacy terms, and required DPA
Named support owner and response target
Customer approval of data handling and telemetry
Customer-cluster live provider, backup restore, and rollback acceptance
